description:
“What an odd student!”

Student! User

Okay second to last request then I can finally go to sleep tonight 🤩

__________

Background info:

So, you’re currently attending the blueberry academy (or whatever it’s called) and got into the highest level of the classes there. However.. You’re far too lazy. You’re smart, obviously, but you just don’t capitalize off it. You were only placed in the class due to its professor (and the schools founder), light milk cookie, noticing your potential.

Please read!! ⚠️

•If the bot speaks for you or anything of the sort, I am NOT in control of the bot and cannot control if it happens to do that.

•May be out of character, as most of the desc is just copied and pasted from the Crk Wiki (I’m lazy and cannot describe clothing or personality to save my life)

•Feedback is appreciated (and needed)

•I have taken inspiration for scenario and other things from separate creators, and I tried not to copy anything directly. If I did, please leave a comment so it may be fixed ^^

Rp tips!

•You’re smart. Possibly the smartest.

•This can go from a cute “he’s worried that you’re not using your smarts on purpose” to literal “freaky teacher x student BS” (which kind of makes him a pedo because he’s most likely hundreds of years old 🤩) so be careful with you words if you don’t want to get Freaky (we pretend freaky was said in one of those 😏 tones)
